reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención en el shop (full), siempre quieren darte el cambio con caramelos, chicles etc…la próxima voy con una bolsa de caramelos a comprar lo que necesito….un desastre, la verdad una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
The service at the shop (full) was terrible; they always try to give you change in candy, gum, etc. Next time I'm going with a bag of candy to buy what I need. It's a disaster, truly shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5czhIQWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Drugstore, aire acondicionado, se puede pagar con distintos medios, baños limpios, buen lugar para descansar un rato, para q sea excelente debería mejorar la atención de la empleada del drugstore, resto ok

(Translated by Google)
Drugstore, air conditioning, you can pay with different methods, clean bathrooms, good place to rest for a while, to be excellent they should improve the attention of the drugstore employee, the rest is ok

reviews.comment:
La única estación de servicio del lugar. La atención pésima, mal trato a los clientes, la fila de espera no la respetan los que están atendiendo. No tenés opción si necesitas parar. El estacionamiento, bueno.

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in town. The service is terrible, customers are treated badly, and the staff doesn't respect the queue. You have no choice if you need to stop. The parking is okay.
